name: Oatmeal Coconut Crisps
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugars until fluffy.
2. Stir in the vanilla, then add the eggs one at a time, beating after each addition.
3. Sift together (or stir) the flour, salt, and baking soda. Add to the creamed mixture.
4. Mix in the rolled oats and shredded coconut (the dough will be stiff; use an electric mixer with a shield attachment for easier mixing).
5. Drop by teaspoonfuls about 2 inches apart onto a well-greased baking sheet.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 10 to 15 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
7. Cool on a wire rack.
This recipe makes approximately 14 dozen cookies when using teaspoons; using tablespoons yields smaller portions.
